title: Column permissions master table

posts.author: Oriana (Oriana Ortega)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi.

I was wondering if there is in the road map something to set the the columns permissions easily.
For example I have multiple boards (with a lot of columns, some of them 20-30 columns) where our team and guests collaborate (the guest usually are different depending on the board, mostly our clients) so setting up the restrictions/permission is critical (as we don’t have a guest see information meant for the internal team only).

I would be nice to have an structure to set the permission like a list of users vs columns with check marks for those privileges (restrict view, restrict edit) the user will have.

Thanks.

posts.author: Kmk (kmk)
posts.cookedHtml: Need it too, under so many boards and diferents types of them…this kind of permission would be nice for the management
